name: Poached Chicken and Fruit Salad
recipeIngredient: 2 1/2 cups Nonfat Low Sod Chicken Broth
1 Medium Leek, Washed and Sliced Thin
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash and cut 10-12 small to medium fresh basil leaves into very thin slices.
2. In a pot of chicken broth, add leek and poach the chicken for about 15 minutes or until done.
3. Remove the chicken, discard the liquid left in the skillet, and let it cool.
4. Cut fruit and basil into bite-sized pieces.
5. Toss all ingredients well in a serving bowl.
6. Add cooled chicken to the fruit mixture and toss to mix.
This dish is perfect for a warm summer evening.
